results.rendered_html: vaitaraṇī f. N. of the Hindū Styx i.e. the river that flows between earth and the lower regions or abode of departed spirits presided over by Yama (it is described as rushing with great impetuosity, hot, fetid, and filled with blood, hair and bones See  RTL. 290, 570 ),  MBh. ;  Pur.  &c.
